---
title: "*The Most Annoying Equation Conversion* (Converting Dimensional Equations) Reference Page"
author: "DOFPro group"
format: html
html-math-method: mathjax
---
::: {.callout-important title="Still Under Construction!"}
This web page is just a bare outline. The complete details have not been filled in yet.
:::
# Intro to *The Most Annoying Equation Conversion*

Main title explanation

## The Most Annoying Equation Conversion

Video 1 explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/6dyg-CgAm8s?si=kvaStVIReTjlrjNj" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[Visuals](../../NotYetHere.qmd)


# Examples and Definitions

## Examples Links

## Definitions

Equations with Dimensions
: Equations that require variables to have specific units or dimensions for the equation to be valid. These equations often involve physical quantities such as length, time, mass, and force.

Dimensional Equations
: Expressions, usually a series of products of unity, that are used to convert a value from one set of units to another. See [Is Furlongs per Fortnight a Thing?](https://youtu.be/5EbL9MEro9E) for an example of how to use dimensional equations to convert units.

Original Units
: The units of the variable(s) in the original equation with dimensions that need to be converted.

Target Units
: The desired units for the variable(s) after conversion of the equation with dimensions.

# Other Links and Videos

## Other Links

## Previous and Following Videos

### The video previous to the previous video (i.e., two videos back)

**Is Furlongs Per Fortnight a Thing?**<br/>*Unit Conversion*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/5EbL9MEro9E), [Info Page](../../basics/processdata/DimensionalEquationsWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../basics/processdata/DimensionalEquationsJTFVisuals.qmd)

### The previous video (i.e., one video back)

**How Keen Is Your Rank? Just the Facts**<br/>*Temperature Conversion*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/XKwl41MvFcE), [Info Page](../../basics/processdata/ConvertingTemperatureWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../basics/processdata/ConvertingTemperatureJTFVisuals.qmd)

### The next video (i.e., one video forward)

**Where Does Sherwood Hide His Unit? Principles**<br/>*Dimensionless Numbers Principles*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/A348vNv5t9c), [Info Page](../../basics/processdata/DimensionlessNumbersVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../basics/processdata/DimNumPart1JTFVisuals.qmd)

### The next after next video (i.e. two videos forward)

**What the Schmidt? Examples**<br/>*Applications of Dimensionless Numbers*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/74SD0k_qBc8), [Info Page](../../basics/processdata/DimensionlessNumbersVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../basics/processdata/DimNumPart2JTFVisuals.qmd)
